name: Shabib ibn Abdullah
title: Brave Companion of Nahshal
shortDescription: A renowned brave man from Kufa who joined Imam Hussain's (AS) army and attained martyrdom on Ashura.
fullStory:
Shabib ibn Abdullah al-Nahshali was a brave warrior and Shia. With complete insight, he recognized the front of truth and made his way from Kufa to Karbala.

On Ashura, Shabib stood by the Master of Martyrs (AS) with all his might and resisted the massive wave of Yazid's army. He showed that faith and loyalty conquer any false power.

During the first attack (the massive shower of enemy arrows) or in hand-to-hand combat, Shabib fought manfully and, after sustaining numerous wounds, drank the sweet nectar of martyrdom.

His name is recorded in sacred Ziyarats (like Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya) as one of Imam Hussain's (AS) loyal companions.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى شَبِيبِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ النَّهْشَلِيِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya:) Peace be upon Shabib ibn Abdullah al-Nahshali...
